allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/graph_default.json'\)\); print\('nodes:', len\(d.get\('nodes',[]\)\)\); print\('edges:', len\(d.get\('edges',[]\)\)\); m=d.get\('meta',{}\); print\('semantic_nodes:', m.get\('semantic_nodes'\)\); print\('focus:', m.get\('focus'\)\); print\('applied:', m.get\('applied_filters'\)\); print\('registry node_types:', len\(m.get\('registry',{}\).get\('node_types',[]\)\)\); print\('first edge sample:', json.dumps\(d['edges'][0], indent=2\) if d.get\('edges'\) else 'none'\); print\('first gn node sample:', json.dumps\([n for n in d['nodes'] if n['id'].startswith\('gn:'\)][0], indent=2\) if any\(n['id'].startswith\('gn:'\) for n in d.get\('nodes',[]\)\) else 'none'\)")
